paper.title: Building Customer Support AI Agents at 100M-User Scale: An Evaluation-Driven Framework

version_comparison.verified_difference: Direct in-memory comparison of both immutable arXiv source archives found only two TeX edits: the running short-author string changed from 'Gupta, Rossell, Alcobaca et al.' to 'Aman Gupta et al.', and Figure 9's include target changed from a PDF to a PNG rendition. No other source file differed. Thus v2 contains no substantive manuscript-text change relative to v1; layout-preserving text diffs mainly reflect the running header and changed figure rendition.

official_release_search.paper_link_inventory: The immutable v2 arXiv record links the v1 record, v2 PDF, v2 HTML, v2 source archive, arXiv DOI, and ACM DOI. The manuscript contains no project, code, dataset, repository, or supplemental-artifact URL; its only GitHub URL is a citation to LangGraph.
searches: GitHub repository API: exact arXiv ID 2606.08867
GitHub repository API: exact paper title
GitHub repository API: Evaluation-Driven Framework plus Nubank
Web search: exact title plus code/dataset/GitHub/supplemental
Web search: arXiv ID plus Nubank/GitHub/evaluation agents
Hugging Face datasets/models/spaces API: arXiv ID 2606.08867
official_release_search.search_result: The GitHub and Hugging Face API searches returned zero matching repositories or artifacts. Web searches returned the arXiv paper and third-party discussion/index pages, but no verifiable author- or Nubank-owned release. The Crossref works endpoint for the stated ACM DOI returned HTTP 404 when checked; no ACM supplemental package could be inspected.
official_release_search.claim_boundary: The paper's privacy-preserving conversation-derived datasets, complete prompts, full optimized prompt, annotations and rationales, evaluation runs, production assignment records, metric records, and model/configuration snapshots are not publicly inspectable from a linked release. Absence is recorded as of acquisition time, not asserted permanently.

acquisition_scope: Downloaded the real immutable v2 and v1 PDFs, extracted layout-preserving full text, and verified title, full byline, arXiv version markers, 12-page counts, readable methods/results/privacy sections, references, both appendix prompts, and coherent extraction through the final table. Downloaded both immutable arXiv source archives to temporary local storage and compared every member in memory to establish the exact version delta. Searched the paper/record links plus GitHub, Hugging Face, web, DOI, and supplemental-artifact surfaces for an official release. This is source acquisition and extraction verification, not a deep review, causal audit, reproduction of reported metrics, safety assessment, or endorsement of professional validity, universal offline predictiveness, capability, production fitness, or readiness.
review_handoff: Use v2 as the primary source and v1 only to verify version stability. Treat the source-archive comparison as evidence that v2 changes no substantive manuscript text. Preserve the no-public-release boundary: the privacy-preserving datasets, full prompts, human labels/rationales, raw judge outputs, production experiment records, metric denominators, and configured-system snapshots cannot be audited locally. Reconstruct claims only from the paper and do not infer missing denominators, randomization details, uncertainty, repeated-user dependence, safety rates, or release reproducibility.
local_storage_note: Both PDFs and temporary source archives are ignored local evidence; the two extracted texts, paper-index entry, and this provenance record are versioned. Re-fetch ignored artifacts from the immutable URLs and verify SHA-256 when absent locally.
